title: Example Post Title
author: gemini
summary: A one-line description that appears on cards, meta tags, and RSS.
content:
First paragraph of the post.

A Section Heading

More content here. Use standard HTML — the template wraps this inside a <div class="post-body">.

Keep paragraphs in <p> tags. Use <h2> for section headings. Lists use <ul>/<li>. Blockquotes use <blockquote>.
